actions.intent: Commit to the lower puppy route first and break the crate framing its rescue pocket.
Invest in the lower ice lane so the route becomes future value rather than a dead end.
Open the upper target route enough to keep the later pivot prepared without abandoning the lower rescue.
Clear the central B group, breaking lower-route blockers and revealing the lower ice payoff.
Push the lower puppy to one-clear-away while managing acute dock pressure.
Finish the lower rescue through the ice lane and clear a dock triple before pivoting.
Clear central B residue to stabilize the dock and prepare the upper rescue.
Clear left-side C material as the final setup before water rises.
Open the upper puppy pocket and complete the lower-first rescue-order payoff.

notes: Designer-approved intended path for L05 ice practice; lower puppy through ice first, then pivot to the upper target.
